original_prompt: Seamlessly integrated into the provided background scene, centrally positioned in the mid-ground is Greta Thunberg, a young man with dark hair, wearing a Naruto Akatsuki cloud hoodie. To his left, slightly behind him, Simon Bolivar, an older woman with silver curly hair in a deep crimson red knitted sweater, is holding a golden lion handle umbrella and is hugging and leaning towards the young man. Positioned to the young man's right, slightly in front of him, Sergey Brin, a child with light brown hair wearing a bright lemon yellow horizontally striped t-shirt is also hugging and leaning towards him. Photorealistic subjects, sharp focus on characters, warm lighting.

entities.description: Greta Thunberg is the central figure, centrally positioned in the mid-ground of the provided background scene. She is a young woman with dark hair, wearing a Naruto Akatsuki cloud hoodie.

Simon Bolivar is positioned to the left of Greta Thunberg, slightly behind her. She is an older woman with silver curly hair, wearing a deep crimson red knitted sweater. She is holding a golden lion handle umbrella and is hugging and leaning towards Greta Thunberg.

Sergey Brin is positioned to the right of Greta Thunberg, slightly in front of her. He is a child with light brown hair, wearing a bright lemon yellow horizontally striped t-shirt. He is hugging and leaning towards Greta Thunberg.
